movie.title: Passenger
movie.overview: After a young couple witnesses a gruesome highway accident, they soon realize they did not leave the crash scene alone, as a demonic presence called the Passenger that won't stop until it claims them both turns their van life adventure into a nightmare.

reviews.author: CinemaSerf
reviews.content: "Tyler" (Jacob Scipio) and "Maddie" (Lou Llobell) are a young couple who have decided to abandon the urban rat-race. She has done some interior design work on their old van, and so the pair set off for a life on the road. To be fair, she is a little less convinced by the romance of this new lifestyle and that only gets worse when they witness a nasty road accident on their first night out. That's just the start of their horrors though as things quite literally start going bump in the night. Is their new home possessed by some malevolent spirit? Well at a chance meeting at a camp of similar travellers, they are advised by "Diana" (Melissa Leo) of a code of conduct to protect them from the menacing "Passenger". That legend all stems from the story of St. Christopher who journeyed the land with a colleague whom everyone assumed was just as benign. It turns out, though, that this companion was in fact a demon who, now replete with his own dog collar, is bent on murderously terrifying all who make the mistake of stopping on the roadside after dark. This is all very procedural stuff and neither the acting nor the writing offer us anything new, but the use of the dark and the largely rural settings, coupled with some fairly intense camerawork and audio editing leaves us with what is, at times, quite a scary little thriller that has a denouement that I did rather enjoy. No, you'll never remember it and it slots nicely into the genre's production-line approach to movies, but it's watchable enough.

reviews.author: Dean
reviews.content:
Passenger is a highly effective, incredibly tense supernatural thriller that breathes fresh, malevolent life into the road-trip horror subgenre, turning the concept of "van life" into a rolling prison of psychological dread.

Director André Øvredal masterfully uses the cramped confines of a vehicle and the isolating darkness of the open road to build a slow-burn masterclass in atmospheric tension. The supernatural elements are handled with great restraint, relying heavily on deep shadows, sudden shifts in perspective, and excellent sound design rather than cheap jump scares. Grounded by strong performances that keep the stakes intensely human, the film excels at maintaining a white-knuckle pace. Backed by gorgeous night-time cinematography and a relentless sense of isolation, it delivers an incredibly solid, genuinely spooky horror experience.

aiEnrichment.summary_one_sentence: A young couple's van life adventure becomes a nightmare when a demonic entity called the Passenger follows them home from a gruesome highway accident and hunts them both.
aiEnrichment.summary_short: A young couple witnesses a horrific highway accident while traveling in their van. They soon discover they left the crash scene with an unwelcome, demonic passenger. The entity, known as the Passenger, relentlessly pursues them and will not stop until it claims them both. Their van life journey quickly descends into a fight for survival against an unstoppable supernatural force.
aiEnrichment.summary_long: A young couple embarks on a van life adventure, seeking freedom and connection on the open road. During their travels, they come upon a gruesome highway accident and bear witness to its bloody aftermath. Unbeknownst to them, they do not leave the crash site alone, as a malevolent demonic presence latches onto them. This entity, referred to as the Passenger, infiltrates their vehicle and their lives. The couple initially notices unsettling occurrences but gradually realizes the true, supernatural nature of their stowaway. As the Passenger's influence grows, it begins to torment them both physically and psychologically. The entity is driven by a singular, relentless purpose: to claim the lives of the two travelers. Their romantic road trip devolves into a claustrophobic nightmare of paranoia and terror. They struggle to understand the rules of the haunting and search for a way to escape or banish the creature. Ultimately, the couple must confront the unstoppable Passenger as it closes in to fulfill its deadly intent.
aiEnrichment.synopsis: Passenger is a horror-thriller drama that follows a young couple whose van life journey takes a dark turn after they witness a violent highway accident. Unaware that something sinister has followed them, they find their trip transformed into a escalating nightmare. A demonic force known as the Passenger attaches itself to them and will not rest until it has claimed them both. Blending road movie atmosphere with supernatural dread, the film explores their desperate struggle to survive and break free from an relentless evil.

story_structure.resolution: The outcome of their encounter with the Passenger is revealed, bringing closure to their ordeal.
story_structure.introduction: A young couple embarks on a van life adventure and witnesses a gruesome highway accident that sets their journey on an eerie course.
story_structure.risingAction: As they travel, unsettling occurrences escalate and the couple struggles to understand and evade the entity while their road trip turns into a fight for survival.
